title: agrostis novae-hollandiae
intro: Agrostis novae-hollandiae, also known as the Australian bent grass, is a type of grass native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis novae-hollandiae are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some commercial herbal remedies.
